ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the state is located in (e.g., South, West) */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the state in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the demographic data belongs to */,
  "age18-29" INTEGER /* Number of people in the state aged 18-29 */,
  "age30-44" INTEGER /* Number of people in the state aged 30-44 */,
  "age45-64" INTEGER /* Number of people in the state aged 45-64 */,
  "age65" INTEGER /* Number of people in the state aged 65 or older */,
  "voting_population" INTEGER /* Voting population of the state */,
  "white" REAL /* Percentage of white population in the state */,
  "african_american" REAL /* Percentage of African American population in the state */,
  "hispanic" REAL /* Percentage of Hispanic population in the state */,
  "asian_other" REAL /* Percentage of Asian or other population in the state */,
  "male" REAL /* Percentage of males in the state */,
  "female" REAL /* Percentage of females in the state */,
  "urban" REAL /* Percentage of urban population in the state */,
  "rural" REAL /* Percentage of rural population in the state */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median household income in the state */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate in the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the election result belongs to */,
  "pres1992" INTEGER /* Result of the 1992 presidential election in the state */,
  "pres1996" INTEGER /* Result of the 1996 presidential election in the state */,
  "pres2000" INTEGER /* Result of the 2000 presidential election in the state */,
  "pres2004" INTEGER /* Result of the 2004 presidential election in the state */,
  "pres2008" INTEGER /* Result of the 2008 presidential election in the state */,
  "pres2012" INTEGER /* Result of the 2012 presidential election in the state */,
  "pres2016" INTEGER /* Result of the 2016 presidential election in the state */,
  "pres2020" INTEGER /* Result of the 2020 presidential election in the state */,
  "candidate_party" TEXT /* Party of the winning candidate */,
  "candidate_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes for the winning candidate */,
  "candidate_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of votes for the winning candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the education data belongs to */,
  "non_educated_whites" REAL /* Percentage of non-educated whites in the state */,
  "high_school_graduates" REAL /* Percentage of high school graduates in the state */,
  "bachelors_degree_holders" REAL /* Percentage of bachelors degree holders in the state */,
  "masters_degree_holders" REAL /* Percentage of masters degree holders in the state */,
  "doctoral_degree_holders" REAL /* Percentage of doctoral degree holders in the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_levels_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the trend data belongs to */,
  "voting_pop_1992" REAL /* Voting population in the state in 1992 */,
  "voting_pop_2000" REAL /* Voting population in the state in 2000 */,
  "voting_pop_2008" REAL /* Voting population in the state in 2008 */,
  "voting_pop_2012" REAL /* Voting population in the state in 2012 */,
  "voting_pop_2016" REAL /* Voting population in the state in 2016 */,
  "voting_pop_2020" REAL /* Voting population in the state in 2020 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_trends_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the candidate */,
  "election_year" INTEGER /* Year the candidate ran for president */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_candidate_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the result belongs to */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes for the candidate */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of votes for the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_candidate_results_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_candidate_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)
